Source   Edit  

Intelligence Report Types

Defines intelligence data structures for spy scout missions Per intel.md and operations.md specifications

Imports

../../common/types/core, ../../common/types/tech

Types

ColonyIntelReport = object
  colonyId*: SystemId
  targetOwner*: HouseId
  gatheredTurn*: int
  quality*: IntelQuality
  population*: int
  industry*: int
  defenses*: int
  starbaseLevel*: int
  constructionQueue*: seq[string]
Intelligence on an enemy colony (SpyOnPlanet mission) Per intel.md:107-121 Source   Edit   
EspionageActivityReport = object
  turn*: int
  perpetrator*: HouseId
  action*: string
  targetSystem*: Option[SystemId]
  detected*: bool
  description*: string
Record of detected espionage activity against this house Generated when espionage attempts are detected Source   Edit   
FleetIntel = object
  fleetId*: FleetId
  owner*: HouseId
  location*: SystemId
  shipCount*: int
  squadronDetails*: Option[seq[SquadronIntel]]
Intel on a specific fleet Source   Edit   
IntelligenceDatabase = object
  colonyReports*: Table[SystemId, ColonyIntelReport]
  systemReports*: Table[SystemId, SystemIntelReport]
  starbaseReports*: Table[SystemId, StarbaseIntelReport]
  espionageActivity*: seq[EspionageActivityReport]
Collection of all intelligence reports for a house Stored per-house in GameState Source   Edit   
IntelQuality {.pure.} = enum
  Visual, Scan, Spy, Perfect
Quality/source of intelligence Source   Edit   
SquadronIntel = object
  squadronId*: string
  shipClass*: string
  shipCount*: int
  techLevel*: int
  hullIntegrity*: Option[int]
Detailed squadron information Source   Edit   
StarbaseIntelReport = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  targetOwner*: HouseId
  gatheredTurn*: int
  quality*: IntelQuality
  treasuryBalance*: Option[int]
  grossIncome*: Option[int]
  netIncome*: Option[int]
  taxRate*: Option[float]
  researchAllocations*: Option[tuple[erp: int, srp: int, trp: int]]
  currentResearch*: Option[string]
  techLevels*: Option[TechLevel]
Intelligence from hacking a starbase (HackStarbase mission) Per intel.md and operations.md:6.2.11 - "economic and R&D intelligence" Source   Edit   
SystemIntelReport = object
  systemId*: SystemId
  gatheredTurn*: int
  quality*: IntelQuality
  detectedFleets*: seq[FleetIntel]
Intelligence on enemy fleets in a system (SpyOnSystem mission) Per intel.md:96-105 Source   Edit  

Procs

proc addColonyReport(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; report: ColonyIntelReport) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add or update colony intelligence report Source   Edit   
proc addEspionageActivity(db: var IntelligenceDatabase;
                          report: EspionageActivityReport) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add espionage activity report to log Source   Edit   
proc addStarbaseReport(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; report: StarbaseIntelReport) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add or update starbase intelligence report Source   Edit   
proc addSystemReport(db: var IntelligenceDatabase; report: SystemIntelReport) {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Add or update system intelligence report Source   Edit   
proc getColonyIntel(db: IntelligenceDatabase; systemId: SystemId): Option[
    ColonyIntelReport] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve colony intel if available Source   Edit   
proc getIntelStaleness(report: ColonyIntelReport | SystemIntelReport |
    StarbaseIntelReport; currentTurn: int): int
Calculate how many turns old this intel is Source   Edit   
proc getStarbaseIntel(db: IntelligenceDatabase; systemId: SystemId): Option[
    StarbaseIntelReport] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve starbase intel if available Source   Edit   
proc getSystemIntel(db: IntelligenceDatabase; systemId: SystemId): Option[
    SystemIntelReport] {....raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Retrieve system intel if available Source   Edit   
proc newIntelligenceDatabase(): IntelligenceDatabase {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Create empty intelligence database Source   Edit
